message:
feat(runtime): Add Program runtime with Model/Cmd pattern

- Add program.rs implementing Bubbletea/Elm-style runtime
- Model trait for app state with init/update/view
- Cmd enum for side effects (None, Quit, Batch, Sequence, Msg, Tick)
- ProgramConfig for screen mode, budget, input settings
- App builder for ergonomic program creation

fix(presenter): Fix cursor tracking after wide characters

- Continuation cells should not advance internal cursor
- Terminal cursor doesn't move when we skip continuation output
- Fixes redundant CUP sequences after wide chars

test: Update wide_char_repro to check for CUP only, not all ANSI

- SGR sequences (style) are expected even with correct cursor
- Test now specifically checks for CUP (cursor positioning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
